title: platanthera bifolia var. patula
intro: Platanthera bifolia var. patula, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family, distinguished by its unique shape and fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate respiratory issues. The lesser butterfly orchid is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
